title: The Pentagon’s New UFO Files Include Fighter Jets, Orange Orbs, and a Lot of Grainy Footage
description: The Pentagon released yet another batch of UFO files on Friday. Like the previous release, there’s some weird stuff in here, but not enough to make me question my existence or fear for my life. This latest release includes 64 files in total: 6 PDFs, 7 audio files, and 51 (!!!) videos.
